messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
BL-498 — Mutation gate: EntrypointBoilerplateIgnorer must also exclude tsc's import-helper preamble (__importStar/__importDefault/__createBinding/__setModuleDefault), ~20-45 unkillable equivalent survivors per import*-as file
What it solves: ORIGIN — hardener rule_proposal (engineering) during BL-485 hardening. VERIFIED by the specifier:
the compiled `extension/out/**/*.js` head of every `import * as x` file carries tsc's helper
preamble — `var __createBinding = (this && this.__createBinding) || (…)`, `__setModuleDefault`,
`__importSta…
Approval context: Hardener-proposed mutation-gate hygiene fix, low risk. FIRM: extend the BL-447 EntrypointBoilerplateIgnorer to also exclude tsc's import-helper preamble (__importStar/__importDefault/__createBinding/__setModuleDefault), which today produces ~20-45 unkillable equivalent survivors per `import * as` f…
BL-498 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-498" (or "reject BL-498 <reason>") to act.
